name: empty
visual_summary: This UI component is invisible and does not provide any visual feedback. It's used as a placeholder for situations where a component is expected, but no content is available. A developer would use this when dealing with API responses or server-side rendered content that needs a default placeholder.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Description: This UI component is invisible and does not provide any visual feedback. It's used as a placeholder for situations where a component is expected, but no content is available. A developer would use this when dealing with API responses or server-side rendered content that needs a default placeholder.
Style: plain
Interactions: none
Tags: empty, placeholder, registry

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
